docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF FEES GRANTED.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED NOV-05-2007, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT FEISS, CATHERINE
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY PLAINTIFF YORE, SEAN

ORDER OF POSTPONEMENT OF HEARING FILED BY PLAINTIFF IS "DENIED". CASE REMAINS SET ON THE ORIGINAL HEARING DATE. ALL PARTIES MUST BE PRESENT ON THAT DATE. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS FROM CASE NO.#822526 MAY BE RETRIEVED FOR PURPOSES OF TRIAL.
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-14-2007 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-14-2007 BY PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: F. RAYRAY. NOT REPORTED (506) PARTIES PRESENT. EVIDENCE RETAINED.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-14-2007 - JUDGMENT. BOTH PARTIES PRESENT. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT, CLERK FANNY RAYRAY. NOT REPORTED. (506).
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,521.20 FILED BY YORE, SEAN AS TO DEFENDANT FEISS, CATHERINE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-14-2007 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF YORE, SEAN
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO DEFENDANT FEISS, CATHERINE

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF YORE, SEAN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT FEISS, CATHERINE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
